channel.title: Manoj's Blog
channel.description: Thoughts on technology, life, and everything in between — from Manoj Kumar.

item.title: The Optimal Rate of Failure
item.description: The economist George Stigler once said, "If you never miss a plane, you're spending too much time at the airport." It's a small line with a big idea tucked inside it. If you never fail at anything, you're probably not being careful — you're being too cautious.

item.title: Between Roots and Waves: Living Real
item.description: There are places where life stops performing and simply exists — unfiltered, unhurried, and unapologetically real. A meditation on roots, the sea, and the unhurried real.
